title: This week's upcoming club cricket action
description: REGIONAL NEWS - With both the Reserve League...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"REGIONAL NEWS - With both the Reserve League Division 2 and Women's League Division 2 finals played last weekend, SWD Cricket still has four leagues in contention for the 2023/24 season, with three in action this weekend.","html":"REGIONAL NEWS - With both the Reserve League Division 2 and Women's League Division 2 finals played last weekend, SWD Cricket still has four leagues in contention for the 2023/24 season, with three in action this weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both leagues which wrapped up last weekend saw first-time winners, with George B emerging victorious over Mossel Bay B in the Reserve League 2 final while Sussex beat Knysna Cavaliers in the Women's League 2 final.","html":"Both leagues which wrapped up last weekend saw first-time winners, with George B emerging victorious over Mossel Bay B in the Reserve League 2 final while Sussex beat Knysna Cavaliers in the Women's League 2 final."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This now leaves the Premier League, Promotion League, Reserve League Division 1 and Women's League Division 1 all in contention."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve League 1 will however conclude this weekend too, as Blanco and Ladismith face off in the final to compete for a spot in next season's Promotion League.","html":"Reserve League 1 will however conclude this weekend too, as Blanco and Ladismith face off in the final to compete for a spot in next season's Promotion League."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile Knysna Cavaliers travel to Mossel Bay in the Premier League and Plett Pioneers travel to George, both on Saturday 10 February.","html":"Meanwhile Knysna Cavaliers travel to Mossel Bay in the Premier League and Plett Pioneers travel to George, both on Saturday 10 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the Promotion League, Hornlee's Pirates United welcome New Dawn Park to Knysna on Saturday.","html":"In the Promotion League, Hornlee's Pirates United welcome New Dawn Park to Knysna on Saturday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The full list of the weekend's fixtures is:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday:","html":"Saturday:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Premier League:","html":"Premier League:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mossel Bay vs Knysna Cavaliers;","George vs Plett Pioneers;","Harlequins Forces vs Pacaltsdorp United"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Promotion League:","html":"Promotion League:"},{"type":"list","items":["Hartenbos vs NMU Madibaz;","Pirates United vs New Dawn Park;","Bongolethu vs Sussex"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve League Division 1 Final:","html":"Reserve League Division 1 Final:"},{"type":"list","items":["Blanco vs Ladismith"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sunday:","html":"Sunday:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Premier League:","html":"Premier League:"},{"type":"list","items":["Union Stars II vs Union Stars I"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Promotion League:","html":"Promotion League:"},{"type":"list","items":["New Dawn Park vs Thembalethu"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
